name: sleeper-league-data
description: Auto-refreshing data pipeline for Borehamwood Plancy fantasy league

scripts.test: node scripts/validate.js && node scripts/test-alltime.js && node scripts/test-artifact.js && node scripts/test-render.js
scripts.build: node scripts/build-template.js && node scripts/build-lore.js && node scripts/build-alltime.js && node scripts/build-artifact.js
scripts.refresh: node scripts/fetch-history.js && node scripts/fetch-rosters.js && node scripts/fetch-stats.js && node scripts/fetch-fc-values.js && node scripts/fetch-trades.js && node scripts/build-template.js && node scripts/build-lore.js && node scripts/build-alltime.js && node scripts/build-artifact.js && node scripts/validate.js

//devDependencies: Test-only tooling for scripts/test-render.js (the user-journey gate). The data-pipeline scripts remain zero-dependency; these are never imported by anything that runs in production or in the daily refresh's fetch/build path.
